input: Imagine a self-contained, hypothetical world with only the following conditions, and without any unmentioned factors or causal relationships: Hwax has a direct effect on pexu and rukz. Pexu has a direct effect on rukz. We know that hwax causes pexu. hwax or pexu causes rukz. We observed an individual is not hwax. Would an individual is rukz if pexu instead of not pexu?
